en:ch1_end_01.original_text:
But slaying the ungrateful would
mean many deaths a year.

Dong Zhuo's fate will be unrolled in later chapters...

en:ch2_oath_dz_restrain_01.original_text: Know your place, commoners. Be grateful I even speak to you.

en:ch2_oath_dz_strike_01.original_text: You dare raise steel against me? I'll have your heads on pikes!

en:ch2_oath_gy_restrain_01.original_text: Let us depart. The realm has larger fires ahead.

en:ch2_oath_gy_strike_after_01.original_text: Even the river spat him back out. Heaven has postponed his punishment.

en:ch2_oath_lb_restrain_01.original_text: Brother, hold! Fury may win a breath, but righteousness must win the age.

en:ch2_oath_lb_strike_01.original_text: If words fail, then let steel answer steel.

en:ch2_oath_zf_restrain_01.original_text: Hmph... I obey, eldest brother. But I will remember this insult.

en:ch2_oath_zf_strike_after_01.original_text: Hmph! Next time, that butcher will not run so fast.

en:ch2_oath_zf_strike_water_after_01.original_text: Bah! Not even drowning would keep that coward down. Next time, I'll tie a stone to him myself.

en:daxing_gy_01.original_text: Third brother is right. We have sworn to destroy these traitors and restore peace. We are ready to march.

en:daxing_gy_choice_01.original_text: Brother, your courage is admirable, but even heroes need strategy. Let us work with the magistrate.

en:daxing_lb_01.original_text: I am Liu Bei, a descendant of Prince Jing of Zhongshan and great-great-grandson of Emperor Jing. These are my sworn brothers, Guan Yu and Zhang Fei.

en:daxing_lb_02.original_text: We have raised a force of five hundred volunteers to serve our country and protect the people.

en:daxing_lb_03.original_text: Magistrate Zhou, we seek only to serve. Lead us to Daxing District; let us put an end to this rebellion.

en:daxing_lb_choice_01.original_text: The people cry out for justice. We cannot stand idle.

en:daxing_lb_choice_02.original_text: We seek glory in service to the Han.

en:daxing_lb_choice_03.original_text: Fifty thousand rebels? We three alone could handle them!

en:daxing_zf_01.original_text: Fifty thousand? Hah! They are but a mob of ants! Give us the order, Magistrate, and we shall scatter them like dust!

en:daxing_zj_01.original_text: Who goes there? These men behind you... they have the look of tigers. You do not look like common recruits.

en:daxing_zj_02.original_text: An Imperial kinsman with a true heart! Truly, the Heavens have not abandoned the Han. Your arrival is most timely.

en:daxing_zj_02_alt.original_text: An Imperial kinsman! Your ambition serves the Han well. Your arrival is most timely.

en:daxing_zj_03.original_text: Scouts report that the rebel general Cheng Yuanzhi is marching upon us with fifty thousand Yellow Turbans.

en:daxing_zj_04.original_text: Very well! I shall lead the main force myself. Together, we shall strike at the heart of Cheng Yuanzhi's army!

en:daxing_zj_04_alt.original_text: Your confidence is inspiring! I shall lead the main force myself. Together, we shall strike at the heart of Cheng Yuanzhi's army!

en:debug_narrative_01.original_text: Cheat code accepted. Narrative scene is functional.

en:dx_cyz_01.original_text: Slay them all! The Han is dead, the Yellow Heavens shall rise!

en:dx_dm_01.original_text: Imperial dogs! You dare stand in the way of the Lord of Heaven?

en:dx_gy_01.original_text: Their numbers are great, but they are but a rabble without leadership.

en:dx_lb_01.original_text: The Yellow Turban vanguard is here. They seek to plunder Zhuo County!

en:dx_lb_02.original_text: Their resolve is weak. If we defeat these captains, the rest will be turned to flight!

en:dx_zf_01.original_text: Let me at them! My Serpent Spear is thirsty for rebel blood!

en:gz_dz_01.original_text: What offices do you three hold?

en:gz_dz_02.original_text: Hmph. Common men with no rank. You may go.

en:gz_dz_help_01.original_text: CURSE THESE REBELS! They have slaughtered my men! Is there no one left to fight?!

en:gz_dz_outlaw_01.original_text: Wait... I know you. You're the ones who attacked imperial escorts and freed that traitor Lu Zhi!

en:gz_dz_outlaw_02.original_text: Hmph! You dare lecture me? I should have you arrested! But... you did save my life today. Leave now, before I change my mind.

en:gz_gy_free_01.original_text: Brother, there may be consequences for this...

en:gz_gy_outlaw_01.original_text: Brother, we cannot stay. If Dong Zhuo learns we freed Lu Zhi, he will have us executed on this spot.

en:gz_gy_restrain_01.original_text: It was wise to stay your hand, brother. The law must take its course. Let us return toward Zhuo.

en:gz_gy_return_01.original_text: Let us return toward Zhuo County. There is nothing more for us here.

en:gz_lb_01.original_text: What is this? Commander Lu Zhi... in chains?

en:gz_lb_attack_01.original_text: That banner reads 'Zhang Jue, Lord of Heaven!' Government soldiers are losing! Brothers, we attack!

en:gz_lb_defend_01.original_text: Lu Zhi was no traitor. He was unjustly accused by corrupt officials.

en:gz_lb_fight_01.original_text: Brother, we cannot stand idle while injustice is done. Free him!

en:gz_lb_free_02.original_text: We have made our choice. Now we fight!

en:gz_lb_freed_02.original_text: Master, I could not stand by while a loyal commander was led to unjust execution.

en:gz_lb_restrain_01.original_text: The court will have its own public judgment. How can you act rashly?

en:gz_lz_explain_01.original_text: Xuande! I had the rebels surrounded and was on the point of smashing them, when Zhang Jue employed sorcery to prevent my victory.

en:gz_lz_explain_02.original_text: The court sent Eunuch Zuo Feng to inquire. He demanded a bribe, but where could I find gold in such circumstances? He reported that I hid behind ramparts and disheartened my army.

en:gz_lz_explain_03.original_text: So I was superseded by Dong Zhuo, and now I go to the capital to answer false charges.

en:gz_lz_freed_01.original_text: Xuande! You have saved me, but at great cost. The court will brand you as rebels for attacking imperial soldiers.

en:gz_lz_freed_02.original_text: Your loyalty does you credit. I will return to Guangzong in secret. Go now, before more soldiers come.

en:gz_nar_poem_01.original_text:
As it was in olden time so it is today,
The simple wight may merit well,
Officialdom holds sway;
Zhang Fei, the blunt and hasty,
Where can you find his peer?

en:gz_nar_restrain_01.original_text: And so the escort and the three brothers went two ways. It was useless to continue on that road to Guangzong.

en:gz_zf_01.original_text: This is outrage! Let me slay these dogs and free you, Master!

en:gz_zf_attack_01.original_text: HA! Finally some Yellow Turbans to smash! Let's go!

en:gz_zf_free_01.original_text: HA! Now you're talking, brother! Come on!

en:gz_zf_rage_01.original_text: We have just rescued this menial in a bloody fight, and now he is rude to us! Nothing but his death can slake my anger.

en:gz_zf_rage_outlaw_01.original_text: The nerve of that swine! First we save Lu Zhi from injustice, now we save Dong Zhuo from death, and this is our thanks?! Nothing but his death can slake my anger!

en:gz_zf_restrain_01.original_text: BAH! This stinks of corruption! But... I will follow your lead, eldest brother.

en:inn_farmer_01.original_text: These Yellow Turban rebels... I try to drink away my worries, but they always return. What will become of us?

en:inn_gy_01.original_text: Quick! Bring me wine! I am in a hurry to get to town and join the volunteers!

en:inn_gy_02.original_text: I am Guan Yu, courtesy name Yunchang. For years I have been a fugitive, for I slew a local bully who oppressed the weak.

en:inn_gy_03.original_text: Now I hear there is a call for volunteers, and I have come to join the cause.

en:inn_gy_04.original_text: The heavens have surely brought us together. We share one mind and one purpose.

en:inn_gy_05.original_text: I agree. We swear by the peach garden.

en:inn_gy_choice_01.original_text: Your words ring true. I would be honored to join your cause.

en:inn_gy_choice_02.original_text: Spoken like a true leader. The people need men like you.

en:inn_lb_01.original_text: Indeed. Honor and duty call us.

en:inn_lb_02.original_text: That man... his presence is extraordinary. Look at his majestic beard and phoenix-like eyes.

en:inn_lb_03.original_text: A noble heart! I am Liu Bei, and this is Zhang Fei. We have just agreed to raise a volunteer army ourselves.

en:inn_lb_04.original_text: To restore the Han and bring peace to the common people. That is our shared destiny.

en:inn_lb_05.original_text: An excellent proposal. We shall do it!

en:inn_lb_choice_01.original_text: Your cause is just. Join us, and together we shall serve the Han.

en:inn_lb_choice_02.original_text: We fight not for glory, but for the people who suffer under this chaos.

en:inn_lb_click_01.original_text: The people suffer while we sit here. We must act soon.

en:inn_lb_wine_01.original_text: The wine here is of fine quality. A good vintage for such troubled times.

en:inn_zf_01.original_text: This wine is good! Together, we shall raise an army that will make the rebels tremble.

en:inn_zf_02.original_text: Hey! You there! You're joining the volunteers too? Come, drink with us!

en:inn_zf_03.original_text: Haha! The more the merrier! Drink, Yunchang! Let us toast to our new brotherhood!

en:inn_zf_04.original_text: ...and that is why the pig escaped! Haha! But seriously, my friends...

en:inn_zf_05.original_text: I feel as though I have known you both for a lifetime.

en:inn_zf_06.original_text: Listen! Behind my farm is a peach garden. The flowers are in full bloom.

en:inn_zf_07.original_text: Tomorrow, let us offer sacrifices there and swear to be brothers! To live and die as one!

en:intro_narrator_01.original_text: The world under heaven, long divided, must unite; long united, must divide.

en:intro_narrator_02a.original_text: Four hundred years ago, the Han dynasty rose from the ashes of the Qin.

en:intro_narrator_02b.original_text: From Gaozu's founding to Guangwu's restoration, the empire stood strong.

en:intro_narrator_02c.original_text: But now, in the reign of Emperor Ling, the Han crumbles from within.

en:intro_narrator_03a.original_text: The Ten Regular Attendants—eunuchs who have wormed their way into the emperor's favor—corrupt the court.

en:intro_narrator_03b.original_text: They silence honest ministers, plunder the treasury, and rule through fear.

en:intro_narrator_03c.original_text: The people suffer while the palace grows fat.

en:intro_narrator_04a.original_text: In this chaos, the three Zhang brothers of Julu Commandery see their chance.

en:intro_narrator_04b.original_text: Zhang Jue, a failed scholar, claims to have received divine teachings.

en:intro_narrator_04c.original_text: He heals the sick, gathers followers, and whispers: 'The Blue Heaven is dead. The Yellow Heaven shall rise.'

en:intro_narrator_05a.original_text: With half a million followers bound in yellow scarves, the Zhang brothers prepare to strike.

en:intro_narrator_05c.original_text: The age of the Han draws to its end.

en:intro_zb_01.original_text: Brother, the official troops melt away at a whisper of our coming! Our strength grows by the day!

en:intro_zb_02.original_text: The Han has grown weak and decadent! The people cry out for justice, and we shall deliver it with fire and steel!

en:intro_zj_01.original_text: The good fortune of the Han is exhausted! The Wise and Worthy Man has appeared!

en:intro_zj_02.original_text: For schemes like ours, the most difficult part is to gain the popular favor. But that is already ours. Such an opportunity must not pass!

en:intro_zj_03.original_text: I am Zhang Jue, the Lord of Heaven! With my brothers Zhang Bao, Lord of Earth, and Zhang Liang, Lord of Human, we shall bring down this corrupt dynasty!

en:intro_zj_04.original_text: The age of the Han is over. A new era begins today—an era of the people, led by the Wise and Worthy Master!

en:intro_zj_05.original_text: Now we march through Zhuo County! Let all who stand in our way be crushed beneath the banner of the Yellow Turbans!

en:intro_zl_01.original_text: The people bind their heads with yellow scarves and join our cause! Soon, all the empire will be ours!

en:intro_zl_02.original_text: Let the imperial dogs flee! Their cities will burn, their armies will crumble. The Yellow Heavens shall rise!

en:map_lb_defeat.original_text: We were overwhelmed! We must regroup and strike again.

en:map_lb_rem_01.original_text: Magistrate Zhou Jing's headquarters is to the East. We must report there at once to begin our service.

en:map_lb_rem_02.original_text: Qingzhou is under siege. We must march there at once to relieve Imperial Protector Gong Jing!

en:map_lb_rem_03.original_text: The siege is lifted. We should return to the Magistrate to see where else we can be of service.

en:map_lb_rem_04.original_text: Master Lu Zhi is confronting Zhang Jue at Guangzong. We should reinforce his camp first and await orders.

en:map_lb_rem_05.original_text: There is nothing more for us at Guangzong. Let us return to Zhuo County.

en:pg_gy_01.original_text: We will rescue each other in difficulty; we will aid each other in danger.

en:pg_lb_01.original_text: We three, Liu Bei, Guan Yu, and Zhang Fei, though of different lineages, swear brotherhood and promise mutual help to one end.

en:pg_lb_02.original_text: We ask not the same day of birth, but we seek to die together on the same day.

en:pg_lb_03.original_text: May the Heaven and the Earth read our hearts. If we turn aside from righteousness, may the Heaven and the Human smite us!

en:pg_lb_04.original_text: The path ahead is long and full of peril, but together, we shall restore the Han!

en:pg_nar_01.original_text: In the peach garden, among the blooming flowers, a black ox and a white horse are sacrificed.

en:pg_nar_02.original_text: The ritual complete, Liu Bei is acknowledged as the eldest brother, Guan Yu the second, and Zhang Fei the youngest.

en:pg_zf_01.original_text: We swear to serve the state and save the people.

en:pro_farmer2_01.original_text: I've heard the rebels are already in the next county. They show no mercy to those who resist. We must prepare for the worst.

en:pro_farmer_01.original_text: The Yellow Turbans... they say they'll burn everything in their path. My family has lived here for generations. What will become of us?

en:pro_lb_01.original_text: The Imperial Clan's blood flows in my veins...

en:pro_lb_02.original_text: ...yet I am but a poor straw-shoe seller.

en:pro_lb_03.original_text: How can I possibly save the people from this chaos?

en:pro_lb_04.original_text: I am of the Imperial Clan. My name is Liu Bei.

en:pro_lb_05.original_text: I wish I could destroy these rebels and restore peace...

en:pro_lb_06.original_text: That would be a great blessing for the people!

en:pro_lb_choice_01.original_text: I sigh for the suffering people.

en:pro_lb_choice_02.original_text: I sigh for my own lost status.

en:pro_nb_01.original_text: NOTICE: The Yellow Turban rebels under Zhang Jue have risen!

en:pro_nb_02.original_text: All able-bodied men are called to defend the Han.

en:pro_nb_03.original_text: Report to the local Magistrate at once.

en:pro_zf_01.original_text: Why sigh, O hero, if you do not help your country?

en:pro_zf_02.original_text: A true hero's heart! You and I are of one mind.

en:pro_zf_03.original_text: Status? Bah! In these times of chaos, only courage and wine matter!

en:pro_zf_04.original_text: I am Zhang Fei, aka Yide.

en:pro_zf_05.original_text: I live in this county, where I have a farm. I sell wine and slaughter hogs.

en:pro_zf_06.original_text: I have some wealth! I am willing to use it to recruit volunteers.

en:pro_zf_08.original_text: Then come! Let us go to the village inn and discuss our plans over wine.

en:qz_bt_lb_03.original_text: I must reach the flag to signal the ambush!

en:qz_gy_01.original_text: A superior strategy, brother. We go at once.

en:qz_lb_01.original_text: I will go. We cannot let the people of Qingzhou suffer.

en:qz_lb_02.original_text: They are many and we but few. We cannot prevail in a direct assault.

en:qz_lb_03.original_text: Guan Yu, Zhang Fei—take half our forces and hide behind the hills. When the gongs beat, strike from the flanks!

en:qz_lb_choice_01.original_text: The people cry out for aid. We must answer their call at once.

en:qz_ms_01.original_text: URGENT! Imperial Protector Gong Jing of Qingzhou Region is under siege! The city is near falling!

en:qz_ret_gj_01.original_text: Heroic brothers! You have saved Qingzhou! When your signal echoed through the pass, we charged from the gates. The rebels were caught between us and slaughtered.

en:qz_ret_gj_02.original_text: Indeed. I have heard that Commander Lu Zhi is hard-pressed at Guangzong by the chief rebel, Zhang Jue himself.

en:qz_ret_gj_choice_01.original_text: Your humility does you credit, but your deeds speak louder than words.

en:qz_ret_gy_choice_01.original_text: A noble cause, brother. We stand with you.

en:qz_ret_lb_01.original_text: We are glad to have served, Imperial Protector. Peace is restored here, but the rebellion still rages elsewhere.

en:qz_ret_lb_02.original_text: Lu Zhi! He was my teacher years ago. I cannot let him face such a horde alone. Brothers, we march for Guangzong!

en:qz_ret_lb_choice_01.original_text: It was an honor to serve. The people of Qingzhou can rest easy now.

en:qz_ret_lb_choice_02.original_text: Commander Lu Zhi needs aid. We cannot abandon a loyal servant of the Han.

en:qz_vic_gy_01.original_text: A well-executed trap, Brother. The high ground served us well.

en:qz_vic_lb_01.original_text: Let us not tarry. The city is still in peril. We must return to the gates and ensure the Imperial Protector is safe.

en:qz_vic_lb_choice_01.original_text: A fine victory, but we must remain vigilant. The city gates await us.

en:qz_vic_nar_01.original_text:
Though fierce as tigers soldiers be, Battles are won by strategy.
A hero comes; he gains renown, Already destined for a crown.

en:qz_vic_zf_01.original_text: Look at them run! Like rats from a sinking ship! We've broken their spirit.

en:qz_vic_zf_choice_01.original_text: Right you are, eldest brother! Let's make sure the city is truly secure.

en:qz_victory_lb_01.original_text: The siege is lifted. We should report back to Magistrate Zhou Jing for our next assignment.

en:qz_zf_choice_01.original_text: That's the spirit, brother! Let's show those rebels what we're made of!

en:qz_zj_01.original_text: I shall reinforce you with five thousand of my best soldiers. March at once!

en:rec_gy_01.original_text: We offer no riches, only the chance to serve with honor under the banner of Liu Bei.

en:rec_lb_01.original_text: Welcome, brothers. Today we are but a few, but tomorrow we shall be an army.

en:rec_lb_02.original_text: Let us march! Our first destination: the headquarters of the local Magistrate.

en:rec_vol_01.original_text: We have heard of your brotherhood! We are but simple men, but we will follow you to the death!

en:rec_zf_01.original_text: CITIZENS OF ZHUO! The Yellow Turbans are coming! Who among you is brave enough to fight for your homes?

en:recov_gy_01.original_text: A momentary lapse in focus. I shall return to the field with renewed vigor.

en:recov_lb_01.original_text: My apologies, brothers. I let my guard down, but my spirit remains unbroken.

en:recov_zf_01.original_text: Bah! Those rascals got a lucky hit in! Next time, they won't be so fortunate!

en:daxing_int_blacksmith_01.original_text: I reforged farm iron into spearheads all night. The county's fate now hangs on your vanguard.

en:daxing_int_guard1_01.original_text: Word is the main rebel host numbers in the tens of thousands. Staying in formation is our only chance.

en:daxing_int_guard2_01.original_text: They paint "Jiazi" on their gates and call it Heaven's will. Steel will answer that lie.

en:daxing_int_gy_01.original_text: When the line wavers, hold your ground. Discipline cuts deeper than any blade.

en:daxing_int_lb_01.original_text: To shield the people is our vow. Brothers, we fight not for fame, but to end this terror.

en:daxing_int_merchant_01.original_text: Roads to the east are half-blocked by refugees. If you march, march fast before supply lines choke.

en:daxing_int_soldier3_01.original_text: I have never seen Zhuo this tense. Even the market folk are carrying spears now.

en:daxing_int_soldier4_01.original_text: After Cheng Yuanzhi, more rebel captains will come. We have to win this first clash cleanly.

en:daxing_int_volunteer1_01.original_text: I was a field hand yesterday. Today I carry a blade. If we fail, our families have nowhere to run.

en:daxing_int_volunteer2_01.original_text: People say the Zhang brothers can call wind and rain. I do not know about that—but I know we cannot yield.

en:daxing_int_zf_01.original_text: Ha! Let Cheng Yuanzhi come. I have been waiting to test this spear on real rebels.

en:daxing_int_zj_01.original_text: The rebels rally under yellow banners and false promises. We must break their momentum before fear spreads.

en:gz_zj_rescue_01.original_text: The Blue Heaven is dead; the Yellow Heaven shall rise! Dong Zhuo, today your fate ends!

en:gz_zj_retreat_01.original_text: Fall back! We withdraw for now—but the Yellow Heaven will rise again!

en:gz_camp_lb_01.original_text: Master Lu! Liu Bei has brought volunteers from Youzhou. We came as soon as we heard you had engaged Zhang Jue at Guangzong.

en:gz_camp_lb_choice_01.original_text: Your command is clear. We march to Yingchuan at once.

en:gz_camp_lb_choice_02.original_text: Before we depart, tell me: where should we regroup after contact?

en:gz_camp_lz_01.original_text: Xuande, your loyalty honors me. I have Zhang Jue pinned here, but his brothers Zhang Liang and Zhang Bao contest Huangfu Song and Zhu Jun at Yingchuan.

en:gz_camp_lz_02.original_text: Take your five hundred and I will lend a thousand regulars. March to Yingchuan, scout the situation, and strike when the chance appears.

en:gz_camp_lz_choice_01.original_text: If the rebels break, report back at Guangzong immediately.

en:yc_af_hfs_01.original_text: You are Liu Xuande? We fired the grass camp in the second watch. The rebels had no saddles, no armor, and broke in panic.

en:yc_af_lb_choice_01.original_text: Understood. Brothers, we return to Master Lu immediately.

en:yc_af_lb_choice_02.original_text: Do you judge Zhang Liang and Zhang Bao to rejoin Zhang Jue without delay?

en:yc_af_zf_01.original_text: Look at this blaze! We arrived too late to wet our blades.

en:yc_af_zj_01.original_text: Zhang Liang and Zhang Bao escaped with remnants toward Guangzong. Report this to Commander Lu Zhi at once.

en:yc_af_zj_choice_01.original_text: That is most likely. Speed your march and Lu Zhi may catch them in disorder.

en:cc_dq_01.original_text: The court sits idle while the Yellow Turbans spread havoc. If this chaos is to end, someone must move first.

en:cc_dq_02.original_text: Something must be done about these refugees.

en:cc_dq_03.original_text: At last - authority to strike the rebels.

en:cc_dq_04.original_text: Write draft notices to every household at once, and send riders to every surrounding village.

en:cc_dq_05.original_text: Send word to my cousin Cao Ren: gather every horseman he can and join me without delay.

en:cc_dq_06.original_text: Arm my household retainers for war, and draw horses from my own stables to mount them.

en:cc_dq_att_01.original_text: At once, Magistrate. We will open the stores and keep order.

en:cc_dq_att_02.original_text: Understood, Magistrate. I will have the gates sealed at once.

en:cc_dq_att_03.original_text: As you command, Magistrate. I will see these orders carried out at once.

en:cc_dq_choice_01.original_text: Open the city granaries. Issue gruel at the east market and register each household in order.

en:cc_dq_choice_02.original_text: Close the gates at once. Redirect new arrivals to neighboring counties before panic swallows the city.

en:cc_dq_msg_01.original_text: Dispatch from Luoyang! Imperial order: Dong Commandery is to muster a cavalry force of five thousand.

en:cc_dq_msg_02.original_text: Draft men and horses from local households and march against the Yellow Turban rebels.

en:cc_dq_msg_03.original_text: Magistrate Cao Cao is elevated to Cavalry Commander and placed in command of this Dong Commandery cavalry force.

en:cc_yc_01.original_text: Yingchuan burns behind them. Huangfu Song and Zhu Jun have already broken their camp.

en:cc_yc_02.original_text: We cut the road here. Leave none to regroup at Guangzong.

en:cc_yc_choice_01.original_text: Then we ride without delay. A beaten enemy must not be given a night to breathe.

en:cc_yc_choice_02.original_text: We secure this field first and gather remounts; then strike again with full speed.

en:cc_yc_cr_01.original_text: Understood! Cavalry forward - close the pass and strike their rear guard!

en:cc_yc_cr_02.original_text: Orders received. I will regroup the riders and prepare to move at once.

en:cc_yc_hfs_01.original_text: Cavalry Commander Cao, your interception came in perfect time. The routed bands have no order left.

en:cc_yc_hfs_choice_01.original_text: Prudent and sharp. Keep your riders fresh and your line intact.

en:cc_yc_zb_01.original_text: Cavalry ahead?! Break through! Break through!

en:cc_yc_zb_retreat_01.original_text: Brother Liang, break away! We will settle this at Guangzong!

en:cc_yc_zj_01.original_text: Zhang Liang and Zhang Bao slipped away with a few horsemen. They will likely run toward Guangzong.

en:cc_yc_zl_retreat_01.original_text: To Guangzong! Rejoin the elder brother!

en:map_cc_rem_01.original_text: Government armies are already engaged with the Yellow Turbans at Yingchuan. We march there now and cut off their retreat.

en:cc_dq_att_00.original_text: Magistrate, the refugees all report the Yellow Turbans are burning and plundering along the roads. The people are carrying old and young alike and pleading to enter the city for shelter.

en:cc_yc_cr_post_01.original_text: Understood. I'll sweep the road, gather stragglers, and have the cavalry ready to move.

en:cc_yc_cr_cmd_tutorial_01.original_text: That soldier is in danger! Issue a command to get him to safety.

en:dx_lb_03.original_text: They keep coming! We must defeat Deng Mao and Cheng Yuanzhi to break them!

en:gz_lb_ret_01.original_text: We have scattered their vanguard, but there are too many! We must retreat!

en:qz_gy_surp_01.original_text: Brother! We heard the signal was... oh. They are all fallen.

en:qz_lb_amb_01.original_text: BEAT THE GONGS! Brothers, strike now!

en:qz_lb_surp_01.original_text: I... I think I've taken care of them already.

en:map_lb_rem_06.original_text: Master Lu sent us to Yingchuan. Huangfu Song and Zhu Jun are engaging Zhang Liang and Zhang Bao there.

en:map_lb_rem_07.original_text: The rebels have already been routed at Yingchuan. We must return at once and report to Master Lu.

en:ch2_probe_lb_01.original_text: Hold the line. Break Gao Sheng first and pressure Zhang Bao.

en:ch2_probe_lb_retreat_01.original_text: Brothers, withdraw! We cannot break his sorcery here today!

en:ch2_probe_zb_01.original_text: You are Liu Xuande? Good. Taste the thunder of the Yellow Heaven.

en:ch2_probe_zb_sorcery_01.original_text: You cannot kill me while Heaven's lightning answers my command!
en:ch2_probe_zb_sorcery_01.stt_output: You cannot kill me while Heaven's lightning answers my command.

en:ch2_zj_camp_lb_01.original_text: Understood. Guan Yu, Zhang Fei - prepare the men. We march at first light.

en:ch2_zj_camp_zj_00.original_text: Xuande, you came by night to join my command. Good.

en:ch2_zj_camp_zj_01.original_text: Xuande, take the vanguard and engage the rebels first.

en:ch2_zj_camp_zj_02.original_text: I will receive your force with full trust. We combine our men as one host and advance against Zhang Bao.

en:inn_liubo_decline_reply_01.original_text: The board will wait. The rebels, perhaps not.

en:inn_liubo_decline_reply_02.original_text: Then keep your eyes sharp. The road plays rougher games than mine.

en:inn_liubo_intro_01.original_text: The road is dangerous, friend. Sit for a game of Liubo before you chase trouble?

en:inn_liubo_repeat_01.original_text: Back to the board? Good. A second game tells more truth than the first.

en:map_lb_ch2_probe_01.original_text: Zhang Bao's sorcery broke our first assault. We regroup at camp and plan a counter.

en:map_lb_ch2_probe_02.original_text: We have seen Zhang Bao's sorcery with our own eyes. We need a counter before the next clash.

en:map_lb_ch2_zhujun_01.original_text: Dong Zhuo's road is not ours. We march to Yingchuan and report to General Zhu Jun.

en:map_lb_ch2_zhujun_02.original_text: General Zhu Jun is at Yingchuan. Let us march there and take proper command against the rebels.

en:inn_liubo_loss_first_01.original_text: No shame in losing the first game. Liubo rewards patience more than pride.

en:inn_liubo_loss_repeat_01.original_text: The board has humbled many travelers. Come back after your battles and we will set the pieces again.

en:inn_liubo_win_first_01.original_text: Ha! A fine first game. You saw the Owl's path before I did.

en:inn_liubo_win_repeat_01.original_text: Again! You read the sticks like a market scale. I will have to stop wagering with you.

en:inn_liubo_tutorial_block_01.original_text: These two birds together have blocked a perch.

en:inn_liubo_tutorial_block_02.original_text: Other birds can't get past them.

en:inn_liubo_tutorial_contest_02.original_text: The next bird to move there will capture the opposing player's bird.

en:inn_liubo_tutorial_goal_01.original_text: The goal of the game is to get 6 points.

en:inn_liubo_tutorial_goal_02.original_text: You can get a point by capturing the opponent's birds.

en:inn_liubo_tutorial_goal_03.original_text: You can also catch a fish in the central pond.

en:inn_liubo_tutorial_goal_04.original_text: Deposit that fish in the opponent's nest to score.

en:inn_liubo_tutorial_goal_05.original_text: A bird with a fish becomes an owl. Simple!

en:inn_liubo_tutorial_move_01.original_text: You get to move two of your birds on your turn.

en:inn_liubo_tutorial_move_02.original_text: The number of face up sticks determines the distance.

en:inn_liubo_tutorial_owl_01.original_text: This piece has caught a fish and become an owl.

en:inn_liubo_tutorial_owl_02.original_text: Owls and birds can capture each other by landing in the same perch.

en:inn_liubo_tutorial_owl_03.original_text: The owl can also score by reaching a nest on the opponent's side.

en:inn_liubo_tutorial_start_01.original_text: You start the game by throwing your sticks.

en:rec_lb_train_no_01.original_text: No. We know enough to begin, and the county cannot wait.

en:rec_zf_train_prompt_01.original_text: Should we pause to do some training?

en:rec_zf_train_yes_01.original_text: Good. Better to strike wood now than miss rebels later.

en:train_gy_01.original_text: Red marks enemies. Blue marks allies. Green marks the heroes under your command.

en:train_gy_02.original_text: Each brother strikes in a different pattern.

en:train_gy_03.original_text: My Green Dragon Crescent Blade sweeps an arc at a range of one or two hexes.

en:train_gy_watch_01.original_text: In real battle, watch the hexes other units are targeting.

en:train_lb_01.original_text: Before battle, watch how the field breathes.

en:train_lb_02.original_text: Enemies and allies move first. They show where they mean to strike.

en:train_lb_03.original_text: Those attacks do not land until you end your turn.

en:train_lb_04.original_text: A hero may move, then attack. You may also attack without moving.

en:train_lb_05.original_text: Click a hero, then click a highlighted yellow hex to move there.

en:train_lb_06.original_text: With an attack selected, click a highlighted red hex to strike.

en:train_lb_07.original_text: My double swords cut in two opposite directions and push the targets back.

en:train_lb_end_turn_01.original_text: Good. All three heroes have attacked.

en:train_lb_end_turn_02.original_text: Now hit the End Turn button.

en:train_zf_01.original_text: If your hand slips, use the buttons in the bottom right.

en:train_zf_02.original_text: One button undoes your last action. One resets the whole turn.

en:train_zf_03.original_text: My Serpent Spear thrusts one or two spaces in a straight line.

en:train_zf_04.original_text: It can damage both spaces, and it pushes the farther target.

en:train_zf_finish_01.original_text: Now go ahead and smash the rest of these dummies.

en:ch2_hj_choice_enter.original_text: I am General-in-Chief. Let Jian Shuo show his hand if he dares.

en:ch2_hj_choice_return.original_text: I will not step blindly into Jian Shuo's knife. I return home and summon the ministers.

en:ch2_hj_eunuch_01.original_text: General-in-Chief He Jin, His Majesty awaits within.

en:ch2_hj_guard_01.original_text: Seal the gate. Jian Shuo commands it.

en:ch2_hj_hejin_01.original_text: Murder me? At the very gate?

en:ch2_hj_narrator_01.original_text: In the fourth month of Zhongping year six, Emperor Ling lay gravely ill.

en:ch2_hj_narrator_02.original_text: He summoned General-in-Chief He Jin to the palace to settle the matter of succession.

en:ch2_hj_narrator_03.original_text: But Jian Shuo and the palace eunuchs had already made their counsel plain: if Prince Xie was to be enthroned, He Jin must first be killed.

en:ch2_hj_narrator_04.original_text: Shaken, He Jin returned to his residence and summoned the ministers, intent on destroying the eunuchs.

en:ch2_hj_narrator_bad_end.original_text: This was not how the chronicle records it. Return to the palace gate.

en:ch2_hj_panyin_01.original_text: Do not enter the palace. Jian Shuo means to murder you.

en:ch2_hj_panyin_02.original_text: Go quickly. The palace walls have ears, and every ear belongs to the eunuchs.

en:ch2_hj_panyin_03.original_text: My lord, no. This is exactly what they want.

en:inn_gy_choice_unlawful_01.original_text: You speak rightly. I have lived as a fugitive for that deed. Let me seek redemption through service to the Han.

en:inn_lb_choice_unlawful_01.original_text: Even when a man deserves punishment, private killing is not lawful. Righteous anger must still answer to the Han.

en:qz_lb_ask_danger_01.original_text: We will help, but tell us the danger first. Which gate is hardest pressed, and who commands the rebels?

en:qz_lb_ride_now_01.original_text: We ride at once. If Qingzhou is near falling, every moment we spend talking costs lives.

en:qz_ms_ask_danger_01.original_text: The western gate bends under their assault. Their banners name no famous general, only Yellow Turban zealots in great number.

en:qz_vic_gy_secure_city_01.original_text: A sound judgment. Victory in the pass means little if the city falls behind us.

en:qz_vic_lb_pursue_01.original_text: If we pursue now, perhaps we can scatter them completely before they rally.

en:qz_vic_lb_return_after_pursuit_01.original_text: Enough. They will not trouble Qingzhou tonight. Now back to the city before the gates ask why we delayed.

en:qz_vic_lb_secure_city_01.original_text: Let us not tarry. The city is still in peril. We return to the gates and secure the people first.

en:qz_vic_nar_pursue_01.original_text: The brothers hunted the broken rebels through the pass, scattering those who tried to rally and driving the rest into the hills.

en:qz_vic_zf_pursue_01.original_text: Ha! That is the fire I like. Give me one charge and I will send them running until sunset!

en:qz_zf_ride_now_01.original_text: Good! Words will not break a siege. Hooves and blades will!

en:ch2_oath_gy_strike_escape_after_01.original_text: He flees with his life and his shame intact. Brother, we have no cause to chase him farther.

en:ch2_counter_camp_choice_reluctant.original_text: It sits poorly with me to answer darkness with such things. Yet lives weigh heavier than pride.

en:ch2_counter_camp_choice_use.original_text: If striking Zhang Bao with filth stops the thunder and saves the men, we use it.

en:ch2_counter_camp_gy_01.original_text: Pig, sheep, and dog blood, with filthy matter besides. Give it to the brothers and keep it ready at both sides of the valley.

en:ch2_counter_camp_lb_01.original_text: Zhang Bao called lightning down on us. In the thunder and black air, it seemed as if soldiers were falling from the sky.

en:ch2_counter_camp_lb_02.original_text: Guan Yu, Zhang Fei: take the right side of the valley. I will press from the left. When Zhang Bao calls thunder, close in and throw the filth on him.

en:ch2_counter_camp_zf_01.original_text: Ha! If thunder answers him, slop will answer thunder.

en:ch2_counter_camp_zj_01.original_text: Then do not meet thunder with spearpoints alone. Blood and filth can foul the rite itself. If Zhang Bao is struck with it, the lightning should fail.

en:ch2_counter_camp_zj_02.original_text: This is not worship of sorcery. It is a soldier's answer: close the distance, foul the caster, and end the thunder.

en:ch2_counter_camp_zj_03.original_text: Good. The road to Yangcheng opens beyond that ridge. Break him there, and he will have only the city walls left.

en:ch2_counter_gy_01.original_text: We are in position on the far side. When he calls the lightning, we close the pincer.

en:ch2_counter_lb_01.original_text: Hold until the thunder breaks and the black air rises. Then get close to Zhang Bao and throw the filth on him to stop his power.

en:ch2_counter_zb_01.original_text: Again you come? Then Heaven's lightning will answer me again!

en:ch2_counter_zb_filth_01.original_text: Filth! You dare foul Heaven's spell? The thunder... it will not answer!

en:ch2_counter_zb_retreat_01.original_text: My spell is broken! Yangcheng - fall back to Yangcheng!

en:ch2_yc_lb_01.original_text: Zhang Bao, surrender now. Lay down your arms, and I will urge mercy for the soldiers on that wall.

en:ch2_yc_lb_02.original_text: The false thunder is silent. May the people behind those walls hear real peace again.

en:ch2_yc_yz_01.original_text: General... the men have no grain, no faith, and no wish to be buried with you.

en:ch2_yc_yz_02.original_text: Yan Zheng has struck down Zhang Bao. I bring his head and surrender Yangcheng.

en:ch2_yc_zb_01.original_text: Clemency? From men who splash filth at Heaven? I am General of Earth. Yangcheng will not bend.

en:ch2_yc_zb_02.original_text: Coward! Speak once more of surrender and I will offer your blood to the Yellow Heaven.

en:ch2_yc_zj_01.original_text: Zhang Bao! Zhang Jue died at Guangzong, and Huangfu Song cut down Zhang Liang at Quyang. Your brothers are gone, your sorcery is broken, and the counties return to the Han.
en:ch2_yc_zj_01.stt_output: Changbao, Changyue-Dead at Guant Song and one full song. Cut down Zhang Liang at Kruiang. Your brothers are gone, your sorcery is broken, and the Counties return to the Han.

en:ch2_yc_zj_02.original_text: Open the gate. Surrender the city, and those who lay down arms may yet live.

en:ch2_yc_zj_03.original_text: Receive the surrender. Disarm the rebels, spare those who submit, and send word of Yangcheng to the court.

en:ch2_yc_lb_choice_threat.original_text: Then hear this plainly: if you force a siege, your followers will die for a spell already spent.

en:ch2_yc_zb_threat_reply.original_text: Threats from woven-mat peddlers? I command the Yellow Heaven. Come up the wall and be buried beneath it.

en:ch2_counter_lb_filth_reminder_01.original_text: That thunder will break us if we let him keep chanting.

en:ch2_counter_zf_filth_reminder_01.original_text: Then get close and hurl the filth at Zhang Bao. Foul the spell at its source!

en:map_lb_ch2_counter_01.original_text: Zhang Bao has fled to Yangcheng. Press on before the city can steady itself.

en:map_lb_ch2_counter_council_01.original_text: The counter is prepared. We return to the valley, close the pincer, and break Zhang Bao's thunder.

en:map_lb_ch2_yangcheng_01.original_text: Yangcheng is before us. End this without wasting the lives of those ready to surrender.

en:ch2_yc_lb_clemency_01.original_text: Zhang Bao, surrender now. Lay down your arms, and I will urge mercy for the soldiers on that wall.

en:ch2_yc_lb_threat_01.original_text: Then hear this plainly: if you force a siege, your followers will die for a spell already spent.

en:ch2_yc_zb_refuse_01.original_text: Surrender? I am the General of Earth. Yangcheng will stand while one Yellow Turban yet breathes.

en:ch2_wan_gy_01.original_text: A trapped army is iron. A fleeing army is reeds before the blade.

en:ch2_wan_lb_01.original_text: General, Wan is not Yangcheng. The question is how to make a false surrender become a real defeat.

en:ch2_wan_lb_02.original_text: Leave the southeast road open. When Han Zhong comes out, strike his broken ranks in the field.

en:ch2_wan_lb_03.original_text: Then the city may fall without turning every desperate man into a corpse.

en:ch2_wan_narrator_01.original_text: After Yangcheng opened its gates, Zhu Jun turned the army south. Han Zhong and the remaining Yellow Turbans had gathered in Wan.

en:ch2_wan_zf_01.original_text: Good! Let them think they have found a road, then I will close it with my spear.

en:ch2_wan_zj_01.original_text: Han Zhong's messenger asks to surrender, yet the gate remains barred and his banners still stand on the wall.

en:ch2_wan_zj_02.original_text: Yangcheng was different. Yan Zheng struck down Zhang Bao, opened the gate, and put the city in our hands.

en:ch2_wan_zj_03.original_text: That counsel is wise. Loosen the siege at the southeast. Place our best troops at the narrow road.

en:map_lb_ch2_wan_01.original_text: Our next march is south. If the rebels ask to surrender, we must think carefully before sealing every road.

en:inn_butcher_npc_01.original_text: Zhang Fei's wine is strong, and so is his word. If he calls this oath sacred, I believe him.

en:inn_soldier_npc_01.original_text: If you three raise the banner, men will follow. The county is waiting for someone to stand first.

en:daxing_int_guard1_push_01.original_text: Some attacks can push enemies, redirecting their blows away from allied soldiers.

en:daxing_int_guard2_push_01.original_text: Pushing an enemy off a cliff deals extra damage. Height can turn one strike into a rout.

en:daxing_int_soldier3_push_01.original_text: If you push enemies into deep water, they drown. Watch the riverbanks when you choose your target.

en:pro_lb_noticeboard_wait_01.original_text: If we can gather men of courage, perhaps this county need not face the rebels alone.

en:pro_zf_noticeboard_wait_01.original_text: Come, Xuande! Wine first, then we find the men to break these rebels.

en:ch2_wan_field_defeat_lb_01.original_text: The plan is still sound. We must meet him in the field before he regains courage.
en:ch2_wan_field_defeat_lb_01.stt_output: The plan is still sound. We must meet him in the field before he regains courage.

en:ch2_wan_field_defeat_zj_01.original_text: Han Zhong slipped the trap because the road was opened without enough pressure. Reform the line and spring it again.
en:ch2_wan_field_defeat_zj_01.stt_output: And Song slipped the trap because the road was opened without enough pressure. Reform the line and spring it again.

en:ch2_wan_field_hz_01.original_text: They opened the road to bait us. Fight through before the trap closes!
en:ch2_wan_field_hz_01.stt_output: They opened the road to bait us. Fight through before the trap closes.

en:ch2_wan_field_lb_01.original_text: Do not let them turn desperation into courage. Break the captains and the rest will scatter.
en:ch2_wan_field_lb_01.stt_output: Do not let them turn desperation into courage. Break the captains and the rest will scatter.

en:ch2_wan_field_lb_02.original_text: A road left open saved more lives than a wall battered in anger.
en:ch2_wan_field_lb_02.stt_output: A road left open saved more lives than a wall battered in anger.

en:ch2_wan_field_zj_01.original_text: Han Zhong has taken the road. Hold discipline and cut through his disordered column.
en:ch2_wan_field_zj_01.stt_output: Han Song has taken the road. All discipline and cuts through his disordered column.

en:ch2_wan_field_zj_02.original_text: The field is ours. Now Wan can be received without trusting a barred gate.
en:ch2_wan_field_zj_02.stt_output: The field is ours. Our one can be received without trusting a barred gate.

en:ch2_wan_gate_defeat_lb_01.original_text: We chose the harder road. Next time, keep pressure on the gate and protect the soldiers beside it.
en:ch2_wan_gate_defeat_lb_01.stt_output: We chose the harder road. Next time, keep pressure on the gate and protect the soldiers beside it.

en:ch2_wan_gate_defeat_zj_01.original_text: A gate assault punishes disorder at once. Pull the men back, dress the ranks, and try again.
en:ch2_wan_gate_defeat_zj_01.stt_output: A gaiter soul punishes disorder at once. Pull the men back, dress the ranks, and try again.

en:ch2_wan_gate_hz_01.original_text: They answer surrender with ladders and blades. Hold the wall!
en:ch2_wan_gate_hz_01.stt_output: The answer, surrender with ladders and blades. Hold the wall.

en:ch2_wan_gate_lb_01.original_text: The rebels chose a closed gate over true surrender. Strike cleanly and end this quickly.
en:ch2_wan_gate_lb_01.stt_output: The rebels chose a closed gate over true surrender. Strike cleanly and end this quickly.

en:ch2_wan_gate_lb_02.original_text: Then let the people see that Han order follows the soldiers through the gate.
en:ch2_wan_gate_lb_02.stt_output: then let the people see that Han Order follows the soldiers through the gate.

en:ch2_wan_gate_zj_01.original_text: Wan's gate stands before us. Break it, but keep the soldiers from plunder.
en:ch2_wan_gate_zj_01.stt_output: Once gate stands before us, break it, but keep the soldiers from plunder.

en:ch2_wan_gate_zj_02.original_text: Wan is taken. This was harsher than the open road, but the city must now be kept in order.
en:ch2_wan_gate_zj_02.stt_output: Hun is taken. This was harsher than the open road, but the city must now be kept in order.

en:ch2_wan_gy_02.original_text: A hard blow may end deceit quickly, if our men keep discipline at the gate.
en:ch2_wan_gy_02.stt_output: A hard blow may end a seat quickly, if our men keep discipline at the gate.

en:ch2_wan_lb_04.original_text: Then let us strike the walls now. If Han Zhong hides behind a false surrender, break the gate before he can profit from it.
en:ch2_wan_lb_04.stt_output: Then let us strike the walls now. Now, if Hangeon hides behind a false surrender, break the gate before he can profit from it.

en:ch2_wan_zf_02.original_text: Ha! If they bar the door while begging mercy, I will knock loudly enough for all Wan to hear.
en:ch2_wan_zf_02.stt_output: Ha! If they bar the door while begging mercy, I would not be allowed enough for all one to hear.

en:ch2_wan_zj_04.original_text: Here, empty words from behind a wall may only be a trick to buy time. I will not trust that alone.
en:ch2_wan_zj_04.stt_output: Here empty words from behind the wall may only be a trick to buy time. I will not trust that alone.

en:ch2_wan_zj_05.original_text: So be it. Form the assault column, but keep order. Wan is to be taken, not burned.
en:ch2_wan_zj_05.stt_output: So be it, form the Assault Column but keep order. Run is to be taken, not burn.

en:map_lb_ch2_wan_field_01.original_text: The southeast road is open. Han Zhong has come out, and we must strike before his men can rally.
en:map_lb_ch2_wan_field_01.stt_output: The southeast road is open. Han Zhong has come out, and we must strike before his men can rally.

en:map_lb_ch2_wan_gate_01.original_text: Wan's gate stands before us. Break it quickly, then keep order inside the city.
en:map_lb_ch2_wan_gate_01.stt_output: Once gate stands before us, break it quickly, then keep order inside the city.

en:ch2_anxi_eunuch_01.original_text: Zhang Jun deceives the throne. These complaints come from men who resent their place, not men who love the Han.
en:ch2_anxi_eunuch_01.stt_output: Telling you and in these halves the throne. These complaints come from men who resent their place. Not men who love the Hun.

en:ch2_anxi_eunuch_both_01.original_text: Liu Bei freed Lu Zhi by force, then raised blades against Dong Zhuo. This is not merit; it is rebellion wearing campaign dust.
en:ch2_anxi_eunuch_both_01.stt_output: Le U by Friedlucci by Forrest then raised blades against Don Chouaou. This is not merit. It is rebellion wearing campaign dust.

en:ch2_anxi_eunuch_dz_01.original_text: Liu Bei is also the man whose brothers raised steel against Dong Zhuo, an imperial general in the field. Is that loyalty?
en:ch2_anxi_eunuch_dz_01.stt_output: Liu Baezou is also the man whose brothers raised steel against Dong Shuo. An imperial general in the field. Is that loyalty? Ah!

en:ch2_anxi_eunuch_freed_01.original_text: Liu Bei is also the man who took arms against imperial escorts and released Lu Zhi. Are we to reward disorder with a seal?
en:ch2_anxi_eunuch_freed_01.stt_output: Liu Bae is other than the man who took arms against Imperial Escorts and released Lu Ji. Are we to reward this order with a seal?

en:ch2_anxi_gy_01.original_text: Merit should speak for itself. Yet at court, even merit seems to need an usher.
en:ch2_anxi_gy_01.stt_output: Marriage should speak for itself, yet at court, even merit seems to need an usher.

en:ch2_anxi_gy_02.original_text: Then we go cleanly. A low office held with righteousness is higher than a high office bought with shame.
en:ch2_anxi_gy_02.stt_output: Then we go cleanly. A low office held with righteousness is higher than a high office bot with shame.

en:ch2_anxi_gy_both_01.original_text: Then we cannot serve through an office, but we can still guard the people wherever chaos opens a road.
en:ch2_anxi_gy_both_01.stt_output: Then we cannot serve through an office, but we can still guard the people wherever Chaos opens a road.

en:ch2_anxi_gy_one_01.original_text: They could not deny your merit, so they made the post smaller than the deed.
en:ch2_anxi_gy_one_01.stt_output: They could not deny your merit, so they made the post smaller than the deed.

en:ch2_anxi_lb_01.original_text: If office comes, we serve. If none comes, our oath remains. Still, the men who followed us deserve to see justice done.
en:ch2_anxi_lb_01.stt_output: If office comes, we serve. If non comes, our oath remains. Still, the men who followed us deserve to see justice done.

en:ch2_anxi_lb_02.original_text: General Zhu has submitted our names. We wait on the court. Nothing more is in my hands.
en:ch2_anxi_lb_02.stt_output: General Chu has submitted our names. We weigh on the court. Nothing more is in my hand.

en:ch2_anxi_lb_03.original_text: Anxi County commandant. The seal is small, but the people beneath it are not small.
en:ch2_anxi_lb_03.stt_output: and she counting commandant. The seal is small, but the people beneath it are not small.

en:ch2_anxi_lb_both_01.original_text: So our reward is not a seal, but breath in our bodies. If that breath remains, we can still choose righteousness.
en:ch2_anxi_lb_both_01.stt_output: So our reward is not to seal, but breath in our bodies. If that breath remains, we can still choose righteousness.

en:ch2_anxi_govern_lb_04.original_text: Inspector, by your harm to the people you should die. I spare you. Take this seal back to those who sell honor so cheaply.
en:ch2_anxi_govern_lb_04.stt_output: Inspector, by your harm to the people you should die, I spare you. Take this seal back to those who sell honor so cheaply.

en:ch2_anxi_govern_narrator_01.original_text: For one month Liu Bei governed Anxi without taking so much as a hair from the people, and the county began to trust the new commandant.
en:ch2_anxi_govern_narrator_01.stt_output: For one month, Liu Baigou and Anxi, without taking so much as a hair from the people, and the county began to trust the new commandant.

en:ch2_anxi_govern_narrator_02.original_text: He ate and slept beside Guan Yu and Zhang Fei, and when he sat in public the brothers stood attendance all day without complaint.
en:ch2_anxi_govern_narrator_02.stt_output: He ate and slept beside Guanyu, and Zhang Fei, and when he sat in public, the brothers stood attendants all day without complaint.

en:ch2_anxi_govern_narrator_03.original_text: The next day, the inspector seized the county clerks and forced them to accuse Liu Bei. Elders came to plead for him and were beaten away from the gate.
en:ch2_anxi_govern_narrator_03.stt_output: The next day the inspectors seized the county clerks and forced them to accuse LuBai. Eldas came to pre-train them and were beaten away from the gate.

en:ch2_anxi_govern_narrator_04.original_text: Liu Bei hung the seal on the inspector, left Anxi with Guan Yu and Zhang Fei, and turned north toward Liu Hui of Dai.
en:ch2_anxi_govern_narrator_04.stt_output: Liu by home the seal on the inspector, left Angxi with Guan Yu and Zhang Fei, and turned north toward Luai Huui of Dai.

en:ch2_anxi_govern_narrator_one_01.original_text: Though another seal hung above him, Liu Bei handled Anxi business without taking so much as a hair from the people.
en:ch2_anxi_govern_narrator_one_01.stt_output: though another seal hung above him, loyal by handled angsty business without taking so much as a hair from the people.

en:ch2_anxi_govern_zf_01.original_text: A thief who harms the people dares call my brother corrupt? Let him hear the truth from my hand.
en:ch2_anxi_govern_zf_01.stt_output: A thief who harms the people, dares call my brother corrupt. Let him hear the truth from my hand.

en:ch2_anxi_gy_both_02.original_text: Then we should leave before the court changes its mind. A pardon spoken in fear may not survive a second whisper.
en:ch2_anxi_gy_both_02.stt_output: Then we should leave before the court changes its mind, a pardon spoken in fear may not survive a second whisper.

en:ch2_liuhui_gy_01.original_text: A righteous road sometimes passes through another man's gate. We accept your shelter with gratitude.
en:ch2_liuhui_gy_01.stt_output: A righteous road sometimes passes through another man's gate. We accept your shoulder with gratitude.

en:ch2_liuhui_lb_01.original_text: Liu Hui of Dai is also of the Han house. If he will receive us, we may wait there until the realm has need of us again.
en:ch2_liuhui_lb_01.stt_output: Liu Huihui of Da is also of the Han House. If he will receive us, we may wait there until the realm has need of us again.

en:ch2_liuhui_lb_02.original_text: Then we remain quiet, protect those near us, and wait for a summons worthy of the oath we swore.
en:ch2_liuhui_lb_02.stt_output: Then we remain quiet, protect those near us, and wait for a summons worthy of the oath we swore.

en:ch2_liuhui_lh_01.original_text: Xuande, I know your name and your blood. The Han is poorer when men like you are hunted. My house is open.
en:ch2_liuhui_lh_01.stt_output: Shwanda, I know your name and your blood. The Huns' poro, when men like you are hunted, my house is open.

en:ch2_liuhui_narrator_02.original_text: Liu Hui sheltered the brothers in Dai. For a time, Liu Bei vanished from court ledgers, but not from the troubled roads of the Han.
en:ch2_liuhui_narrator_02.stt_output: Liu Huyi sheltered the brothers in Die. For a time, Liu by vanished from court ledges, but not from the troubled roads of the Han Doth.

en:ch2_liuhui_narrator_anxi_01.original_text: After the seal was returned and Anxi left behind, Liu Bei, Guan Yu, and Zhang Fei traveled north with warrants already likely riding after them.
en:ch2_liuhui_narrator_anxi_01.stt_output: After the seal was returned and Anxi left behind, Liu Baiguan Yu and Zhang Fei travelled north with warrants already likely riding after them.

en:ch2_liuhui_narrator_both_01.original_text: The court had pardoned Liu Bei but granted no post. He dismissed the volunteers to their villages and left Luoyang before pardon curdled into pursuit.
en:ch2_liuhui_narrator_both_01.stt_output: The court had pardoned Liu Bai Bai, but granted no post. He dismissed the volunteers to their villages, and left Luoyang before pardon curdled into pursuit.

en:ch2_liuhui_zf_01.original_text: Hiding sits badly on my shoulders. Still, better here than bowing to an inspector with a hungry palm.
en:ch2_liuhui_zf_01.stt_output: Heinsits badly on my shoulders. Still, better hear than bowing to an inspector with a hungry palm.

en:map_lb_ch2_anxi_01.original_text: The court has named our place. We march to Anxi and serve the people there as cleanly as we can.
en:map_lb_ch2_anxi_01.stt_output: The Corps has named our place. We march to Angsi and serve the people there as cleanly as we can.

en:map_lb_ch2_liuhui_01.original_text: We cannot remain under the court's eye. Liu Hui of Dai may shelter us until a better summons comes.
en:map_lb_ch2_liuhui_01.stt_output: We cannot remain under the court's eye, Liu Huoyi of Daimei shelter us until a better summons comes.

en:ch2_luoyang_liubo_accept_01.original_text: Then let the sticks speak while the ministers keep silent.
en:ch2_luoyang_liubo_accept_01.stt_output: then let the stick speak while the ministers keep silent.

en:ch2_luoyang_liubo_decline_01.original_text: Another time. We should keep our eyes on the gate.
en:ch2_luoyang_liubo_decline_01.stt_output: Another time! We should keep our eyes on the gate!

en:ch2_luoyang_liubo_decline_reply_01.original_text: As you wish. The board moves faster than the court.
en:ch2_luoyang_liubo_decline_reply_01.stt_output: As you wish, the board moves faster than the court.

en:ch2_luoyang_liubo_intro_01.original_text: Waiting at court is its own campaign. Sit for a game of Liubo while the palace decides your fate?
en:ch2_luoyang_liubo_intro_01.stt_output: Waiting at court is its own campaign. Sit for a game of liubo while the palace decides your fate.

en:ch2_luoyang_liubo_loss_01.original_text: Liubo teaches patience. A useful lesson when palace doors open slowly.
en:ch2_luoyang_liubo_loss_01.stt_output: Liewbaugh teaches patience. A useful lesson when palestores open slowly.

en:ch2_luoyang_liubo_win_01.original_text: A clean victory. May the court read merit as clearly as you read the board.
en:ch2_luoyang_liubo_win_01.stt_output: A clean victory. May the court read merit as clearly as you read the board.

en:ch2_wan_final_sj_01.original_text: Then I will be first on the wall. Zhao Hong will learn how little his reclaimed city is worth.
en:ch2_wan_final_sj_01.stt_output: Then I will be first on the wall. Zhao Hong will learn how little his reclaimed city is worth.

en:ch2_wan_final_sj_02.original_text: Well said. The wall is taken; now the officers must hold the city better than the rebels did.
en:ch2_wan_final_sj_02.stt_output: Well said, the wall is taken. Now the officers must hold the city better than the rebels did.

en:ch2_wan_rev_sj_01.original_text: General Zhu Jun, Sun Jian of Xiapi answers the imperial call. My men are ready to strike Wan.
en:ch2_wan_rev_sj_01.stt_output: General Chuyun, Son Jian of Siapi, answers the imperial call. My men are ready to strike one.

en:ch2_wan_final_lb_01.original_text: Brothers, press the gate with Sun Jian. Break Zhao Hong and Sun Zhong here before the rebellion scatters again.
en:ch2_wan_final_lb_01.stt_output: Brothers, press the gate with Sun Jian. Break Zhao Hong and Sun Zhong here before the rebellion scatters again.

en:ch2_wan_final_zj_01.original_text: Xuande has chosen to join Sun Jian at the wall. My remaining troops will watch the roads; your task is to break this gate.

en:ch2_anxi_palace_guard_01.original_text: Palace order: only summoned officers and court officials bearing memorials may pass. Soldiers awaiting reward must remain outside.
